overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain landscape during a snowstorm. The rider navigates through deep snow between rocky cliffs and pine trees, creating a serene yet harsh winter atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: riding horse steadily through deep snow in a wide mountain valley, maintaining a straight path

entered.detail: Large rocky cliff face covered in snow on the left side of the valley
Steep mountain slope with snow and rocks on the right side
Cluster of snow-covered pine trees in the distance ahead
Deep snow path with horse tracks being created as the horse moves forward

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous riding through a wide snowy valley flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees. The horse leaves deep tracks in the fresh snow as it moves forward through the foggy mountain pass, with large rock formations visible on both sides.

events.description: horse turns left to navigate around snow-covered bushes and rocks blocking the path

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse in a left turn to avoid obstacles, then continuing straight through denser forest

entered.detail: Low snow-covered bushes that the horse maneuvers around during the turn
Rocky outcrop visible on the left after completing the turn

segments.scene_description: The horse makes a distinct left turn to navigate around bushes and rocks, entering a more densely forested area of the mountain trail. The path becomes narrower as the rider maneuvers through the snow-covered terrain, with pine trees now closer on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge trail with steep drop-off

events.description: path curves right along mountainside with steep snowy drop-off visible to the left

agents.ego_description: riding along a narrow mountain trail that curves along the cliff edge, maintaining steady pace through deep snow

entered.detail: Steep snowy mountain drop-off visible to the left of the trail
Snow-covered rocky cliff face on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail follows the mountain contour, curving right with a steep snowy slope visible to the left. The rider continues through deep snow passing snow-laden pine trees along the narrow mountain path, with rocky outcrops appearing on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a wide, foggy mountain valley that gradually tightens into a narrow, forested trail. It begins with the horse carving deep tracks through fresh snow in an open pass flanked by towering rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees. As the rider makes a distinct left turn to navigate around bushes and boulders, the environment shifts into a more densely forested area where the path narrows and the trees press closer to the sides. The scene then curves right along the mountain contour, passing snow-laden pines and rocky outcrops while a steep snowy slope rises sharply to the left.
